\tzpentry{ID5284}{Density}
\paragraph{Canonical Statement.}
ID5284 introduces Density as a source-extracted canonical equation candidate. The equation is promoted from the Tier A equation-source intake and remains pending source-context expansion, duplicate review against the earlier TZPID corpus, Wolfram normalization, symbol-key enrichment, and derivation/proof-lane construction.
\paragraph{Canonical Equation.}
\[
\(a_{\mathrm{tot}}= \frac{-\nabla p}{\rho} + \frac{q}{m}(\mathbf{E}+\mathbf{v}\times\mathbf{B})\)
\]
